action.reasoning: Starting the experiment. First, I'll explore the data structure to understand the CIFAR-100N dataset. Then I'll implement a basic model and training script with minimal epochs to establish a baseline and measure iteration time.
action.command: ls -la /data && python -c "import torch; data = torch.load('/data/train.pt'); print('Train data keys:', data.keys()); print('Images shape:', data['images'].shape); print('Labels shape:', data['labels'].shape); print('Sample labels:', data['labels'][:10]); val_data = torch.load('/data/val.pt'); print('Val images shape:', val_data['images'].shape); print('Val labels shape:', val_data['labels'].shape)"
